evals.name: topic-default
evals.prompt: /linkedin-post topic: how AI rebuilt my cold email stack (3 drafts)
evals.expected_output: 3 LinkedIn drafts, hook before the fold, broetry spacing, link in first comment
expectations: Exactly 3 drafts produced
Each draft's first line (hook) is under ~210 characters and stops the scroll
Broetry spacing: short paragraphs with blank lines between, no wall of text
No links in the body; any link is in a first comment
Plain text only, zero markdown (no **bold**, no headings, no markdown bullets)
3-5 hashtags at the end
No AI-tell words, no em dashes, no placeholders
Each post is under 3000 characters

evals.name: topic-led-hook
evals.prompt: /linkedin-post topic: the cold email stack math, $400-1200/mo vs $97/mo (3 drafts)
evals.expected_output: 3 drafts with distinct hook styles (number-led, contrarian, confession), one CTA each
expectations: Exactly 3 drafts produced
The 3 hooks use distinct styles (not the same opening pattern repeated)
Each hook fits before the ~210-char fold
Each post has exactly one clear CTA
Story then lesson then CTA structure is visible
No AI-tell words, no em dashes, no placeholders
Plain text only, no markdown

evals.name: short-confession
evals.prompt: /linkedin-post topic: a deal I lost because I replied to a cold email lead 12 hours late (2 drafts)
expectations: Exactly 2 drafts produced
At least one opens with a personal confession or scene in line 1
Peer-to-peer operator voice, not guru lecturing
Under 250 words each
No AI-tell words, no em dashes, no placeholders
Jargon defined in the same sentence on first use
One CTA and 3-5 hashtags each
